raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nahze tas Praweets
Semajus pee Rekabeamu / un
pee Juhda Leeleem-Kungeem/ kas
Sisaka pehz Jerusalemē bij sa-
pulzejschees/ un fazzija us teem:
Ta sakka tas KUNGS: Juhs
efat mann atstahjuschi/ tapehz
eſmu es juhs arridsan atstahjis
Sisaka Rohkā.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad pasemmojahs tee J-
fraeka Leeli-Kungi/ un tas keh-
ninsch/ un fazztja : Tas KUNGS
irr taisnis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rad nu tas KUNGS re-
dseja/ ka tee pasemmojahs/ tad
notikke ta KUNGA Wahrdsus
Semaju/ fazzidams: Tee irr pa-
semmojuſchees/ es ne gribbu tohs
isdeldheht/ bet es gann drihsi tohs
isglahbichu/ un ne isgahsischu
mannu Bahrsibu pabr Jerusalemē-
mi zaar Sisaka Rohku/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tatschu teem buhs win-
naim par Kalpeim buht/ ka tee
atsihst mannu Kalposchanu/ ir
to Semnes Walstibu Kalpo-
schann.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad atnahze Sisaks tas
Egiptes Kehninsch prett Jerusa-
lemi/ un nehme ta KUNGA
Namna Mantas un ta kehnixa
Namna Mantas / wiꞥſch keh-
me wiffu/ wiꞥſch noxeime arri-
dsan tahs Selta preekſchtuttra-
mas Bruunas / ko Salantans
bij darrijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Kehninsch Reka-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Rad nu tas Kehninsch ta
KUNGA Namnā gabje/ tad
nahze tee Pils Karra-Wihri un
nesfe tahs/ un pehz nesfe tee tahs
atpakkat to Pils Karra-Wihru
Kambari.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kad wiꞥſch pasemmo-
jahs/ tad nowehrsahs ta KUN-
GA Bahrsiba no ta/ ka wiꞥſch
to wiffai ne isdeldeja / jo eeſch
Juhda bija wehl kahds Labbuins/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Kehninsch Reka-
beams stiprinajahs Jerusalemē/
un waldija. Jo Rekabeams bi-
ja tschetrdelmits un weenn Gad-
du wezz/ kad tas par Kehnixu
tappe/ un waldija feptinpadeſ-
mits Gaddus Jerusalemē/ tai
Pilsfahta/ ko tas KUNGS no
wiffahm Israeka Ziltin bij is-
wehlejs/ favu Wahrdu tur lift/
un winna Mahtei bija Naema
Wahrdā/ weena Ammoniterene,
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch darrija taunu/
jo winna Sirđs ne bija pastab-
wiga to KUNGU mekleht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Rekabeama Leejas /
tik labbi tahs pirnas ka tahs
pehdejas/ tahs irr rakstitas eeſch
ta Praweeta Semaja Grahma-
tahm/ un ta Redsetaja Jodufa/
kur tee Raddu-Raksti irr uerak-
stiti : Ir Rekabeama un Jerobea-
ma Raeri wiﬀōs winnu Laikos.
Pypyp
"
    }
